features.name: verilator public_on attribute with module hierarchy
features.description: Code should include the verilator public_on directive applied to a design with multi-level module hierarchy where an intermediate module only contains submodule instantiations

features.name: wrapper module with no public wires instantiating submodule
features.description: Code should include a wrapper module that has no public wires of its own but instantiates a submodule with public wires

features.name: conditional generate with module instantiation in scope hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a conditional generate block that instantiates a module which itself instantiates another submodule, creating a scope chain
features.snippet:
generate
  if (ENABLE) begin : gen_scope
    wrapper inst ();
  end
endgenerate

features.name: multi-level module hierarchy with internal scope traversal
features.description: Code should include a three-level module hierarchy where the middle level has no public wires, to test VPI scope traversal through intermediate scopes
